ogTitle: Laravale vs Lark Hill: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Laravale and Lark Hill.
heading: Laravale vs Lark Hill — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Laravale, Queensland and Lark Hill, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Laravale has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Lark Hill (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Laravale or Lark Hill safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Laravale has a flood risk score of 23/100, while Lark Hill scores 52/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Laravale scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Lark Hill scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Laravale or Lark Hill?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Laravale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
